description_short: Ad-free QR code and barcode scanner with scan history and flashlight
description_full: The cleanest QR and barcode scanner on the store. Point your camera, get instant results. No ads, no tracking, no sign-up required. Supports QR codes, EAN-13, EAN-8, UPC-A, UPC-E, Code 128, Code 39, ITF, PDF417, Aztec, and Data Matrix. Every scan is saved to your history for easy retrieval. Built-in flashlight for scanning in dark environments.
features: Instant QR code scanning via camera
Barcode support: EAN-13, EAN-8, UPC-A, UPC-E, Code 128, Code 39, ITF, PDF417, Aztec, Data Matrix
Scan history with timestamps (stored locally, last 200)
Auto-detect: opens URLs in browser, shows text, parses vCards, WiFi configs
Copy result to clipboard with one tap
Share scanned content via system share sheet
Scan from photo library (import image with QR code)

screens.name: ScannerView
screens.description: Full-screen camera preview with scan overlay rectangle. Flashlight button top-right. History button top-left. Scan result appears as bottom sheet on detection.
components: Scan target overlay (rounded rect, semi-transparent border)
Bottom sheet on scan: result text, type badge, open/copy/share buttons

screens.name: HistoryView
screens.description: List of past scans. Each row shows scan type icon, content preview, timestamp. Tap to see full result. Swipe to delete.
components: List: type icon | content preview | timestamp
Tap opens detail view with full content + action buttons
Swipe to delete, clear all button

technical_notes.ios_scanning: Use AVCaptureSession with AVCaptureMetadataOutput. Set metadataObjectTypes to all supported barcode types. Process in real-time on the camera feed.
technical_notes.android_scanning: Use Google ML Kit Barcode Scanning (on-device, no network). bundled model, works offline.
technical_notes.selling_point: The key differentiator is ZERO ADS. Free QR scanners are infested with full-screen interstitials. This app's entire value proposition is being clean and ad-free for $0.99.

aso.title: QR & Barcode Scanner+
aso.subtitle: Ad-Free, Fast, Private
aso.keywords: qr scanner,barcode reader,qr code,scan barcode,qr reader,code scanner,barcode scan,no ads scanner,qr scan,upc scanner
aso.promotional_text: Finally, a QR scanner with zero ads and zero tracking. Scan, copy, share. That's it.

privacy_policy.special_note: Camera is used ONLY for scanning codes. No images are stored, transmitted, or analyzed beyond barcode detection.
